cards.front: Why is 'Positional Encoding' necessary in the Transformer architecture?
cards.back: Because the model contains no recurrence and no convolution, positional encoding is injected to give the model a sense of the order of the sequence.

cards.front: What functions are used to generate Positional Encodings in the Transformer?
cards.back: Sine and cosine functions of different frequencies.

cards.front: What property allows the model to easily learn relative positions using the proposed sine/cosine encodings?
cards.back: For any fixed offset k, the encoding for position (i + k) can be represented as a linear function of the encoding for position i.
